templates.title: Swarm monitoring
templates.description: Monitor your cluster performances with Prometheus & Grafana
templates.note: Requires Docker version 19.03.0+. Make sure to add the monitoring == true one of your Swarm manager node before deploying this stack.

templates.title: Jupyter Notebook Editor
templates.description: Standalone Jupyter 5.5.0 Notebook editor for Python 3.6
templates.note: Deploys Jupyter Notebook editor with Python 3.6.5, Tensorflow 1.11.0 and Keras enabled.

templates.title: SparkCluster 2.4.7 - Jupyter 5.7.8 - Python 2.7.16
templates.description: Spark 2.4.7 cluster with Jupyter 5.7.8 Notebook editor for Python 2.7
templates.note: Deploys a Spark cluster running Spark 2.4.7 with Python 2.7.16, Tensorflow 2.1.0 and Keras enabled together with Jupyter 5.7.8 and PixieDust 1.1.19

templates.title: SparkCluster 2.4.7 - Zeppelin 0.10.0_snapshot - Python 3.7.10 - TF 2.4.1 - custom
templates.description: 40Gb worker stack with Spark 2.4.7 cluster with Zeppelin 0.10.0 (snapshot) with Python 3.7.10 and Tensorflow 2.4.1
templates.note: Deploys a Spark cluster running Spark 2.4.7 with Python 3.7.10, Tensorflow 2.4.1 and Keras enabled together with Zeppelin 0.10.0 (snapshot) configured with Nokia CSL authentication.

templates.title: Small SparkCluster 3.3.0 - Zeppelin 0.11.0_snapshot - Python 3.9.9 - TF 2.10.0 - no xpcore
templates.description: 40Gb per worker stack with Spark 3.3.0 cluster with Zeppelin 0.11.0 (snapshot) with Python 3.9.9 and Tensorflow 2.10.0
templates.note: Deploys a Spark cluster running Spark 3.3.0 with Python 3.9.9, Tensorflow 2.10.0 and Keras enabled together with Zeppelin 0.11.0 (snapshot) configured with Nokia CSL authentication.

templates.title: SparkCluster 3.3.0 - Zeppelin 0.11.0_snapshot - Python 3.9.9 - TF 2.10.0 - no xpcore
templates.description: 155Gb per worker Stack with Spark 3.3.0 cluster with Zeppelin 0.11.0 (snapshot) with Python 3.9.9 and Tensorflow 2.10.0
templates.note: Deploys a Spark cluster running Spark 3.3.0 with Python 3.9.9, Tensorflow 2.10.0 tensorflow-probability 0.18.0 and Keras enabled together with Zeppelin 0.10.0 (snapshot) configured with Nokia CSL authentication.

templates.title: Small SparkCluster 3.5.1 - Zeppelin 0.11.0_snapshot - Python 3.11.9 - TF 2.16.1 - no xpcore
templates.description: 40Gb per worker stack with Spark 3.5.1 cluster with Zeppelin 0.11.0 (snapshot) with Python 3.11.9 and Tensorflow 2.16.1
templates.note: Deploys a Spark cluster running Spark 3.5.1 with Python 3.11.9, Tensorflow 2.16.1 and Keras enabled together with Zeppelin 0.11.0 (snapshot) configured with Nokia CSL authentication.

templates.title: SparkCluster 3.5.1 - Zeppelin 0.11.0 - Python 3.11.6 - TF 2.16.1 - no xpcore
templates.description: 145Gb per worker Spark 3.5 cluster with Zeppelin 0.11.0 (snapshot) with Python 3.11.9 and Tensorflow 2.16.1
templates.note: Deploys a Spark cluster running Spark 3.5.1 with Python 3.11.9, Tensorflow 2.16.1 and Keras enabled together with Zeppelin 0.11 (snapshot) configured with Nokia CSL authentication.

templates.title: Post ANO cluster SparkCluster 3.5.1 - Zeppelin 0.11.0 - Python 3.10.12 - TF 2.16.1 - Pytorch 2.2.1+cu121
templates.description: 145Gb per worker Spark 3.5 cluster with Zeppelin 0.11.0 (snapshot) with Python 3.10.12 and Tensorflow 2.16.1
templates.note: Deploys a Spark cluster running Spark 3.5.1 with Python 3.10.12, Tensorflow 2.16.1 and Keras 3.0 enabled together with Zeppelin 0.11 (snapshot) configured with Nokia CSL authentication.
